title: Ganbare! Nakamura-kun!!
synopsis:
The moment the gloomy Okuto Nakamura first laid eyes on Aiki Hirose during the school entrance ceremony it was love at first sight. Ever since then, Nakamura has dreamt of becoming Hirose's best friend. However, every attempt he makes to talk to his popular classmate ends in utter disaster for him. 

Much to Nakamura's surprise, he does eventually make an impression on Hirose, albeit not quite the one he wanted. Fortunately, the school year has only just started so he has more than enough time to turn the tide in his favor. Unfortunately for Nakamura, however, it seems that the biggest obstacle in his way is his own delusions!

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
